metadata.sourceReliabilityNote: Institutional fields are primarily from RWA.xyz secondary data because official Tether Gold legal pages are JavaScript-rendered in automated fetches. Verify against official legal/terms/fees pages before production grading.
metadata.directPurchaseMinimumDescription: RWA.xyz states direct purchase from Tether Gold verified users requires a minimum of 50 fine troy oz of gold, i.e. 50 XAUt tokens, and lists Min. Investment as 200,000 USD.
metadata.regulatoryFrameworkCandidate: El Salvador Digital Asset Law (LEAD); CNAD - El Salvador National Commission of Digital Assets
